SEARCH
Package eu.algites.lib.common.documentation.model

Interface AIiDocumentationTableWriteAccess

All Superinterfaces:
AIiDocumentationBlockElement, AIiDocumentationBlockElementWriteAccess, AIiDocumentationElement, AIiDocumentationElementWriteAccess, AIiDocumentationTable
All Known Implementing Classes:
AIcDocumentationTable
public interface AIiDocumentationTableWriteAccess extends AIiDocumentationTable, AIiDocumentationBlockElementWriteAccess
Provides write access to a documentation table.

The read-only contract is defined by AIiDocumentationTable. This capability interface is intended for construction, aggregation, and model-processing phases. Validators, renderers, and other read-only consumers should depend on the read-only interface instead.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    addColumn(AIiDocumentationTableColumn aColumn)
    Adds a table column at the end of the column list.
    void

    Adds a table row at the end of the row list.
